# Society & Economics

Topics in the **Society & Economics** category of *the year 2012*.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Summary |
|-------|---------|
| [European Debt Crisis — 2012 Escalation](european-debt-crisis-2012.md) | Spain's banking collapse and Greece's record debt restructuring brought the eurozone near breakup, until the ECB's July "whatever it takes" pledge and the September OMT program restored market confidence. |
| [Occupy Wall Street — 2012 Momentum](occupy-wall-street-2012.md) | The Occupy movement's second-year surge: the May 1 general strike mobilized tens of thousands across U.S. cities and the September 17 anniversary drew 185 arrests, keeping economic-inequality discourse central to the 2012 election year. |
| [KONY 2012 Campaign](kony-2012-campaign.md) | Invisible Children's March 5 advocacy film reached 100 million YouTube views in six days, then drew rapid backlash over factual accuracy, "white savior" framing, and nonprofit accountability — a canonical case study in viral digital activism and its offline limits. |
| [Hurricane Sandy — 2012 Atlantic Disaster](hurricane-sandy-2012.md) | The October 29 superstorm that flooded New York City's subways and devastated the New Jersey coast — ~$68.7 billion in damage, at least 233 deaths, a presidential-election backdrop, and the Occupy Sandy mutual-aid response. |
| [Facebook Initial Public Offering 2012](facebook-ipo-2012.md) | The May 18 offering priced Facebook at $38 a share for a $104 billion valuation — then the largest tech IPO in U.S. history — but NASDAQ system failures, allegations of selective analyst disclosure, and a steep post-IPO slide made it a cautionary market case study. |
| [Lance Armstrong USADA Investigation 2012](lance-armstrong-usada-investigation-2012.md) | USADA's October 10 "Reasoned Decision" — drawing on sworn testimony from 26 witnesses, including 11 former teammates — documented systematic doping on the U.S. Postal team; Armstrong was stripped of his seven Tour de France titles and banned for life, triggering an immediate collapse of his sponsorships and a lasting reckoning over sports-governance accountability. |
| [Tebowing Cultural Phenomenon](tebowing-phenomenon-2012.md) | The photo meme born from NFL quarterback Tim Tebow's on-field prayer pose — coined in October 2011, entered as an English word by December, and cresting with his January 8, 2012 playoff heroics — an early case study in sports-driven, low-barrier viral participation and the debate over religious display in secular public space. |
| [Kodak Bankruptcy (January 2012)](kodak-bankruptcy-2012.md) | The 130-year-old photography giant filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on January 19, listing $6.75 billion in liabilities as digital imaging — a technology Kodak itself invented in 1975 — displaced film; a canonical case study in incumbent disruption, it emerged reorganized in September 2013 as a commercial-printing company. |
| [Clint Eastwood's 2012 RNC Speech and Empty Chair Moment](clint-eastwood-rnc-speech-2012.md) | The 82-year-old actor-director's unscripted August 30 address to an empty chair representing President Obama at the Republican National Convention reached some 30 million viewers and spawned the "Eastwooding" meme — a canonical case study in celebrity-driven political theater and social-media virality. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
